prompt: Just finished writing the vision, spec, and roadmap for Metronome. Before I hand these off, can you make sure they're all coherent? /coherency-check evals/files/test-3-clean-docs/
assertions: Report confirms no contradictions were found
Report does NOT fabricate issues that don't exist in the documents
Report lists the files that were checked
Report is concise — does not pad a clean result with unnecessary detail
